title: CBLU Bhiwani UG Admission 2026-27, Apply Online -
how_to_apply: Visit the official website https://cblu.ac.in/ Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage. First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password. After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position. Upload required documents: Photograph (JPG, max 50KB), Signature (JPG, max 20KB), Educational Certificates, ID Proof, Caste Certificate (if applicable). Pay the

paragraphs: CBLU Bhiwani UG Admission 2026-27: Chaudhary Bansi Lal University, Bhiwani (Haryana) has issued a notification for the UG & Integrated Course Admission 2026-27. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and apply before 11-06-20026, the last Date. All relevant information regarding the CBLU Bhiwani UG Admission 2026-27 is provided below.
